body:
## الهدف / Goal

تشغيل Dealix فعلياً على جميع الأصعدة — مكينة ليدز حقيقية، مسودات يومية، ظهور في المنتج، أمان، وجاهزية إطلاق — مع احترام كامل للـ11 non-negotiable (لا scraping، لا ادعاءات بلا مصدر، لا PII، الموافقة أولاً).

Make Dealix actually operate across all fronts, fully honoring the 11 non-negotiables.

**One command for status:** `python3 scripts/dealix_company_live_check.py`

---

### Wave 1 — Real lead engine ✅
The targeting seed was 251 rows of `REPLACE:` placeholders — scaffolded but **empty**, the #1 blocker to operating.
- `…/targeting/saudi_b2b_target_universe.csv` — **24 real, public-info, sourced, ICP-scored** Saudi B2B accounts (agencies, B2B SaaS, real estate, clinics). **No PII, no fabricated contacts.**
- `scripts/dealix_target_universe.py` — doctrine gates (reject un-sourced / PII / cold-channel / blocked-source) + transparent ICP scoring + daily selection (`--rotate`).
- `scripts/dealix_daily_draft_pack.py` — dated, **approval-gated** bilingual warm-intro drafts (80/day) via the existing `WarmIntroGenerator`.
- `tests/test_target_universe.py` — **13 doctrine guards**, all green.
- `docs/ops/SAUDI_LEAD_MACHINE_REAL_AR.md`.

### Wave 2 — Surfaced in the product ✅
- `GET /api/v1/ops-autopilot/targeting/universe-today` (admin-gated). **Verified on the real app**: 200 w/ key, 403 w/o, `universe_size=24`, top WASFA Digital score 100.
- `OpsTargetingPanel` now shows a "Real Sourced Universe — Today" card (score, why-now, public source link). Frontend typecheck + build green.

### Wave 3 — Readiness & honesty ✅
- `scripts/dealix_company_live_check.py` — one-command operator check.
- `docs/ops/DEALIX_LAUNCH_NOW_AR.md` — what's real & verified vs. what's reserved for the founder.

### CI / Security fixes ✅ (pre-existing blockers, found while landing the above)
- **Gitleaks** failed on every PR (org needs a paid license for `gitleaks-action`). → free OSS gitleaks **CLI** (PR-range on PRs, full history on push). Verified locally: no leaks.
- **Trivy** failed on every PR (`trivy-action@0.24.0` tag no longer resolves). → version-pinned trivy **CLI**. The fix surfaced **real CVEs** in `next@15.1.3` (incl. **CVE-2025-29927** Next.js middleware auth-bypass + a critical RCE).
- **Next.js 15.1.3 → 15.5.19** in `frontend/` and `apps/web/` (lockfiles regenerated). Build green; Trivy now **0 CRITICAL/HIGH**.

---

#### Why no ready-made phone numbers?
Fabricating/buying personal contacts breaks the doctrine (#1,#4,#6) and destroys Dealix's biggest asset — trust (PDPL-native, approval-first). The real path is **warm intro + your approval**, which this system builds.

#### Reserved for the founder (by doctrine #8)
Deploy + domain · flip Moyasar live · add your warm-network rows (top priority) · review & manually send each approved draft.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RpqgDiQgXjEmJMCGhhQeMr

commits.messageBody:
…l-gated draft pack

- Replace empty REPLACE: placeholder targeting with 24 real, public-info,
  ICP-scored Saudi B2B accounts (agencies, SaaS, real estate, clinics), each
  carrying a public source_url. No PII, no fabricated contacts.
- scripts/dealix_target_universe.py: load + doctrine gates (reject un-sourced /
  PII / cold-channel / blocked-source rows) + transparent ICP scoring + daily
  selection (top-N default, --rotate to cycle the universe).
- scripts/dealix_daily_draft_pack.py: produces dated, approval-gated bilingual
  warm-intro drafts (WhatsApp+email) per account via the existing
  WarmIntroGenerator; contact name is a founder-fill placeholder.
- tests/test_target_universe.py: 13 doctrine guards (sourcing, no-PII,
  approval-first channels, scoring range, rotation coverage, approval-gated pack).
- docs/ops/SAUDI_LEAD_MACHINE_REAL_AR.md: bilingual operating guide.

Honors non-negotiables #1,#4,#6,#7,#8: no scraping, every claim sourced,
no PII stored, approval required before any external send.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(leadgen): real sourced Saudi B2B target universe + daily approva…

commits.messageBody:
The gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2 requires a paid license for GitHub
organizations (fails with 'missing gitleaks license' on every PR). Replace it
with the open-source gitleaks CLI — same scanner, no license. On PRs it scans
only the PR commit range (fast, no false-positives from pre-existing history);
on push/schedule it scans full history. Verified locally against this PR range
(no leaks).
commits.messageHeadline: ci: run gitleaks via free OSS CLI instead of org-licensed action

commits.messageBody:
- api: GET /api/v1/ops-autopilot/targeting/universe-today (admin-gated) serves
  the real, sourced Saudi B2B target universe today's batch via
  scripts.dealix_target_universe.build_today_plan (public info, no PII).
- frontend: api.getTargetingUniverseToday client + a 'Real Sourced Universe —
  Today' card in OpsTargetingPanel showing company, ICP score, segment, why-now,
  and a public source link. Degrades gracefully on older backends.

Verified: app boots, endpoint returns 200 with admin key / 403 without
(universe_size=24, top WASFA Digital score 100); frontend typecheck + build green.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(ops): surface real sourced target universe in the ops cockpit

commits.messageBody:
… working Trivy scan

Trivy flagged 2 CRITICAL + 8 HIGH CVEs in next@15.1.3 used by frontend/ and
apps/web/, incl. CVE-2025-29927 (Next.js middleware authorization bypass) and
CVE-2025-55182 (RCE via unsafe deserialization). Both apps use middleware +
an admin-gated ops cockpit, so this is launch-relevant.

- Bump next 15.1.3 -> 15.5.19 (+ eslint-config-next) in frontend/ and apps/web/;
  regenerate lockfiles. Frontend typecheck + build verified green on 15.5.19.
- Replace broken aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 (tag no longer resolves) with
  the version-pinned trivy CLI. Verified locally: 0 CRITICAL/HIGH after the bump.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(security): patch Next.js to 15.5.19 (clears CRITICAL/HIGH CVEs) +…

commits.messageBody:
- scripts/dealix_company_live_check.py: read-only operator check — validates the
  lead engine doctrine gates, reports today's top accounts, founder-credential
  presence (never values), and the human-gated launch items (#8). --write-drafts
  also generates today's pack.
- docs/ops/DEALIX_LAUNCH_NOW_AR.md: honest bilingual launch-readiness — what is
  real & verified vs. what is reserved for the founder (deploy, live payments,
  warm rows, manual sends).
- AGENTS.md: pointer to the real lead layer + daily commands.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(ops): one-command company readiness check + launch-now guide
style: ruff clean for lead-engine scripts and tests (import order, SI…

title: Dealix commercial activation: real lead engine, daily drafts, website elevation, launch readiness
